PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jun-19-2019 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar May-22-2019 Continued To Jun-19-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Richard Kimbell appeared by telephone for Petitioner.

The Court stated that it is awaiting response to the Probate Examiner's notes and a supplement to the petition that deals with the issues that were raised. Mr. Kimbell stated that on May 22nd he forwarded a supplement to the petition and a declaration of real property to the Court. The Court informed Counsel that those documents were rejected because they are subject to mandatory e-filing. Mr. Kimbell suggested putting the matter over and stated that he thinks will associate in Counsel from San Francisco. The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary is continued to June 19, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.
